violations.text: The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per person in charge, pest control comes on a monthly basis. Pest control records were reviewed at time of inspection. Establishment must clean and schedule pest control services immediately. Please email inspector a detailed pest control report. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025

The floors under equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2025
Menu board is lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
Equipment was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
Utensils were observed stored in sanitizer between uses. Utensils must not be stored in sanitizer between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
